reviews.review_description:
No tutorial, no explanation for how to do anything. Stuck in a room with paintings and a blue rectangle. The door won't open. Messed around with all the paintings. Nothing happens. Nowhere to go, nothing to do. 

I guess the graphics of my robot body are kind of decent...

Pretty cool but need help 3 room w phn after radio tuned the number given can’t put in phn caus can’t get phone off the hook?? Now I’m a tad mor new to VR and blond so I might’ve missed a step so… like being a robot and had fun on figuring out first 2 so hopeing if bug maybe fix and the grabbing is a tad difficult. Hopeing it can b fixed and or helppp if not 😆
W game took like 30 minutes to beat uhhh yeah really good the goobers that DONT know how to beat it are SIMPLETONS … 😼

reviews.review_title: My dog made a better game

reviews.review_description: Never met this L0fran person but her game is pretty good
